name: SiYuan
description: SiYuan knowledge base — 19 tools to read, search, create, edit, move and audit docs in your live kernel. Ships the KB house style as MCP instructions.

settings.label: SiYuan URL
settings.help: Base URL of your SiYuan kernel, e.g. https://siyuan.example.com — no trailing slash.

settings.label: SiYuan API token
settings.help: SiYuan → Settings → About → API token. Sent as 'Authorization: Token …'.
